title: Verify the reminder notification is successfully delivered 24 hours before trial expiry
description: Tests the end-to-end flow of the 'Remind Me' feature, culminating in the user receiving the notification via WhatsApp/Push.
preconditions: User has enabled the 'Remind me' toggle.
User's trial is configured to expire in approximately 24 hours.

steps.description: 1. As a user with a trial expiring in ~24 hours, ensure the 'Remind me' toggle is active.
2. Wait until the 24-hour pre-expiry mark is reached.
3. Check the user's device for a Push Notification and/or WhatsApp message.

expected_result: The user receives a notification with clear copy informing them their trial is ending soon and providing instructions on how to cancel.
